title: sorbus torminalis f. mollis
intro: Sorbus torminalis f. mollis, also known as the downy service tree, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its showy white flowers and edible red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorbus torminalis f. mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
